name_cn:
🆕 Changed Code Chip Version Exclusive Real Photos This M13137
Launched for the 2025 Cruise early spring runway, the Nova Small and Medium bags present a subtle mirror effect on the noble calfskin, combining a casual style with an elegant tone. Brand and Monogram canvas trim highlight classic elements, and the dazzling sliding chain makes it easy to create a refined look.
Monogram canvas trim fabric lining metal brand name
Center zip pocket
Chain: Sliding and adjustable, not removable
Chain half-length: 28.0cm
Chain half-length adjustable to: 50.0cm
Monogram canvas trim fabric lining metal brand name interior pocket
Fits laptops and A4 documents

Large: 37x36x10cm
